title: pelargonium luteum
intro: Pelargonium luteum, also known as the yellow-leaved pelargonium or yellow geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium luteum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium luteum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
